title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system architecture that minimizes LLM calls by using deterministic code and the before_model_callback pattern to route decisions away from the model. The approach uses algorithms like Spine and Sprout for NP-hard problems like marathon route planning, enabling 1000 stateless agents to run on Google Cloud with minimal token consumption.
